title: Dalek Mod : Interiors Plus
description: A Dalek Mod Tardis interior Datapack.
body:
**NOTICE TO RETURN DOWNLOADERS:**
If you have downloaded this datapack before and are returning to download the new update you will need to redownload both the datapack AND the resourcepack.


Dalek Mod : Interiors Plus is a datapack addon for the Dalek Mod that give you a wider variety of Tardis Interiors.

All Interiors are fully survival compatible, and all Interiors are built within the default Dalek Mod 32x32 land plot and will line up with the corridor doorways.

**INSTALATION:**
download the datapack titled "DM-Interiors-Plus.zip" DO NOT UNZIP
place into your datapacks folder

download the resourcepack titled "DM-Interiors-Plus-Resources.zip" DO NOT UNZIP
place into your resourcepacks folder

Note that the resourcepack is not required for the datapack to work but without it
the display pictures for the interiors will show as missing textures

**Current Interiors:**
- "Classic 27"     (7th Doctor)
- "TT Capsule"    (Hellbent)
- "Shalka"      (Shalka Doctor)
- "Secondary"    (4th Doctor)
- "Researcher"     (The Rani)
- "Nostalgic Gold"   (TARDIM)
- "Nostalgic Logistic" (Tardis Mod 1.7)
- "Marble War"     (War Master)
- "Drifter"       (2nd Doctor)
- "Story"       (Dalek Mod: Story Mode)
- "Wooden"      (Original Design)
- "Ethereal"      (Original Design)
- "SIDRAT Dark"   (The Master)

Please credit if you decide to use this in a video or any other projects.
